message:
fix(conformance): use frankenlibc regfree/globfree instead of libc (bd-qerp)

Fixed free(): invalid pointer crash during conformance verification.
Root cause: mixing frankenlibc's glob/regcomp with libc's globfree/regfree.
The internal structures are incompatible, causing invalid free.

Changed:
- execute_glob_case: libc::globfree -> frankenlibc_abi::string_abi::globfree
- execute_regcomp_case: libc::regfree -> frankenlibc_abi::string_abi::regfree
- execute_regexec_case: libc::regfree -> frankenlibc_abi::string_abi::regfree

Verification now completes: 838 total, 637 passed (up from 476).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
